[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Diagnose autopilot health and disable failing deprecated GAS triggers
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/223
  
  Details:
  Investigated autopilot production logs on EC2 (100.52.234.163): verified service healthy, identified 4 failing GAS scripts flooding email poller (Gas Fee Update, Exchange Rate Update, Populate Contribution Submission, Telegram Compilation). The first 3 were already deprecated (LATOKEN API 503) but still had active time-based triggers. Also tested Oracle GAS and confirmed it's responding correctly. Helped disable all 3 deprecated triggers to stop the failure email flood.
